issuesFound.title: Missing accessible name on empty `<a>` elements
issuesFound.explanation: Multiple `<a>` elements lack accessible names (no text content, no `aria-label`, no `title`, no `aria-labelledby`). These elements are critical for keyboard users and screen reader users who cannot rely on visual cues alone. Missing accessible names violate WCAG 1.1.1 (Content on Pages) and 1.3.1 (Info and Relationships).
